title: iberis carnosa subsp. senneniana
intro: Iberis carnosa subsp. senneniana, also known as Rock Cress, is a plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family, characterized by its small, white, and fragrant flowers. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Iberis carnosa subsp. senneniana include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
